title: .NET Full-stack Developer for Baltic Product Squad
company: If P&C Insurance AS Latvijas filiāle

summary.lv: Praktisks .NET full-stack izstrādātājs If P&C Insurance Baltijas produktu komandā, kas veido jaunu mikroservisu pārdošanas platformu uz Azure ar C#/.NET un React, ievērojot clean code, SOLID un Azure DevOps CI/CD principus.
summary.en: Hands-on .NET full-stack developer joining If P&C Insurance's Baltic Product Squad to build a new microservice-based core sales platform on Azure with C#/.NET and React, following clean code, SOLID and Azure DevOps CI/CD practices.
